name: flex-rf
description: Flex RF and tidy3d.rf guidance for RF and microwave simulation workflows.

interface.shortDescription: AI guidance for Flex RF microwave simulations.
interface.longDescription: Use Flex RF through your AI coding agent for RF and microwave simulation setup, 3D FDTD workflows, 2D mode analysis, result analysis, and documentation lookup. Includes tidy3d-mcp for current Flexcompute documentation and API lookup.
defaultPrompt: Help me build a Flex RF S-parameter simulation.
Choose the right RF port and mesh settings.
Review this RF workflow for microwave simulation issues.
